title: Neatmenu tavo veido
overview: Story about teenage love in sanatorium. Leta, a girl with a heart disease, and Saulius, a new boy in sanatorium, fall in love with each other, but doctors try to forbid young people feelings.

trailers.title: Vaidybinio filmo "Neatmenu tavo veido" anonsas. Lietuva, drama, 1988 m. Režisierius: R. Banionis
